sources.title: 1936 French - Caught in the Foreign Legion - Mischief, mayhem, and military madness
sources.description:
A hen-pecked husband finds his life turned upside down, when he is accidentally enlisted in the French Foreign Legion. He is sent to fight in Algeria.

Original title: Un de la légion (One of the Legion)

Director: Christian-Jaque
Writers: J.D. Newsom, Paul Fékété

Cast:
Fernandel as Fernand Espitalion
Robert Le Vigan as Leduc
Daniel Mendaille as Charlin
Arthur Devère as Vandercleef
Rolla Norman as Carron
Thérèse Dorny as Antoinette Espitalion
Jacques Varennes as Durand
Paul Amiot as Le colonel
Jean Kolb as Le médecin-chef
Suzy Prim as Maryse
Paul Azaïs as Turlot
Régine Dancourt as L'amie de Pierrot
Georges Malkine as Le légionnaire russe
Eugène Stuber as Un légionnaire
Marcel Vidal as Maître Troude

Genres: French Cinema, Adventure, Comedy, War
Release date: September 18, 1936(Paris, France)
Filming location: Marseille and Algeria

https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=UUMOycDFnpMeWzaITQSD1dWsOA

@CultCinemaClassics

metadata.Plot: Fernand Espitalion is miserable as totally whipped husband of a dragon 'passed on' -like cloths- by his late cousin. She often leaves him waiting outside like a dog when she does business. While she sees a notary about an inheritance, he's seduced to a bar by a shady man. The rogue gets Fernand drunk, knocks him out and switches costumes and papers. He's now Robert Durand, a voluntary Foreign legion recruit. After failed attempts to explain, he tastes military life and finds it less disciplined and more enjoyable then, marriage. But will that last when his wife tracks him and his unit is sent to action in tribal Algeria?
metadata.Actors: Fernandel, Robert Le Vigan, Daniel Mendaille
